timeline.title: Photography starts
timeline.note: Getting ready details, flat lays, and candid prep coverage.

timeline.title: First look
timeline.note: Couple first look near the venue courtyard.

timeline.title: Family portraits
timeline.note: Immediate family first, then extended family combinations.

timeline.title: Cocktail hour
timeline.note: Room details, candids, and remaining portraits.

timeline.title: Reception
timeline.note: Introductions, first dance, speeches, parent dances, and open dance floor.

faq.question: When is our final payment due?
faq.answer: Final payment is due 30 days before the event unless your contract says otherwise.

faq.question: Can we update the timeline?
faq.answer: Yes. Use the timeline editor to keep the studio updated while planning.

faq.question: Where do we send vendor contacts?
faq.answer: Add vendor contacts in the vendor panel so the team has one clean contact list.

faq.question: How does the photo booth monogram work?
faq.answer: Open the photo booth design studio from the dashboard once the monogram section is connected.
